title: Cobblemon Effectiveness
description: A simple mod for Cobblemon that displays type effectiveness in Pokemon battles
body:
# Overview
Cobblemon Effectiveness is a simple client-side mod for Cobblemon that helps trainers make better battle decisions.
Whenever you enter a Pokémon battle, the mod shows a clean, compact UI overlay that highlights which move types are super effective against your opponent’s active Pokémon.

No more guessing type matchups – see ×2 and ×4 effectiveness at a glance!

# Support & Suggestions
Mod is still in-dev so some issues may arise. If you run into any issues or have a suggestion please join the [Cobblemon Discord](https://discord.com/invite/cobblemon) and reach out in the dedicated support thread in `#content-zone-help` or [raise an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Aruloci/CobEffectiveness/issues).

## Supported mods
- [Gravel's Extended Battles](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravels-extended-battles)

## Known issues
Any mod that changes a Pokemons types or introduces new ones is most likely not going to work. Support has to be added manually.
